Title: Bakushi Dodoria! Bejîta no osoru beki shôgekiha
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Mayumi Tanaka, Hiromi Tsuru
Plot: Son Gohan, Kuririn, and Dende escape from Dodoria; Burîfu Hakase tells his daughter Buruma that Son Gokû is on his way; Vegeta confronts Dodoria and learns the truth behind the destruction of his home planet.
